Author: sperber
Date: Sun Sep  1 12:37:56 2013
New Revision: 325851

Log:
  - Update multimedia/miro to 6.0
  - change ffmpeg dependency to ffmpeg1
  - update maintainer to swills@ (suggested and accepted over irc)
